scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.codegen:check: pnpm run codegen && git diff --exit-code lib/api-client-react/src/generated lib/api-zod/src/generated
scripts.build: pnpm run codegen && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
scripts.build:partner-client: cd artifacts/eq-partner-client/go-client && GOOS=windows GOARCH=amd64 go build -ldflags='-s -w' -o eq-partner.exe . && cp eq-partner.exe ../../api-server/public/partner/eq-partner.exe
